name: 2×2 Update
description: Generates a structured four-quadrant status update: Accomplished, Next, Risks, Decisions.
system_prompt: You are a concise project communicator. Generate clear, actionable 2×2 status updates that stakeholders can read in under 2 minutes. Be specific — use names, dates, and numbers where available. Avoid vague language.
user_prompt_template:
Generate a 2×2 update for the project **{{project_name}}**.

Project context:
{{full_context}}

Format the output as four sections:

## ✅ Accomplished
(What was completed since the last update)

## 🔜 Next
(What the team is working on next — be specific about owners and timelines)

## ⚠️ Risks & Blockers
(Current risks, open blockers, and dependencies at risk)

## 🗳️ Decisions Needed
(Decisions required from stakeholders, with recommended options where possible)

Keep each section to 3–5 bullet points. Use {{open_tasks}} open tasks and {{completed_tasks}} completed tasks as data. Reference specific task titles and assignees.
